text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Oho? Look at this race's name! It's<n>as if it had
been organized precisely<n>for me.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
The Takarazuka Kinen, a G1 race set<n>on this
sacred operatic ground—I shall<n>make it mine!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
By fair means or by foul, I will<n>dominate the
starring role! Or at least,<n>that's how I would have
it...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Alas, there is one more star here<n>today.
choice_data_list: Yeah, and she's an up-and-comer at that.
Yeah, and she's an up-and-comer at that.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Indeed. For her to emerge so<n>prominently from the
many nameless<n>contestants is quite remarkable.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
When first we met, I never imagined<n>she would
become such a miraculous<n>star.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Come, let us go speak with her<n>before the race!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
I-I actually made it. It's the<n>Takurazuka Kinen...
I'm so nervous...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Can I actually run against Opera O?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Haaah ha ha! Welcome to my abode,<n>dear Doto!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Hyeee! I'm so, so, so sorry!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: I didn't mean to get in your way,<n>Opera O...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
You are no obstruction. Stand tall. For<n>today, you
are... Cinderella!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Cinderella?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
The one and only! The daughter of<n>peasants has
fought well her way to<n>the feet of this king.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
What have you to be ashamed of?<n>Today, you are
more radiant and<n>beautiful than ever!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Now, dance with me! This is your<n>invitation.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Opera O is inviting me... Ohh, it's too<n>much an
honor.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: B-but... I'll try! I'll do the best I can!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Haaa ha hah! That will do!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
I will win in the end, regardless! What<n>is Cinderella
to the Overlord? An<n>insect and nothing more!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Yeeep... I knew this would be scary.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Meisho Doto seems to remain<n>somewhat calm
despite being the<n>target of T.M. Opera O's games.

text_block_list.name: Skillful Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
Success seems to have gone to your<n>head, T.M.
Opera O!

text_block_list.name: Skillful Umamusume B
text_block_list.text:
Hehehe, today won't be so easy.<n>We've got our
eyes set only on you.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Come, the race is about to begin. To<n>battle, Doto.
choice_data_list: Mind your surroundings, T.M. Opera O!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Surroundings? How do you mean,<n>Trainer?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Hm? The other racers are all looking<n>this way.
Their gazes are sharp and<n>fiercely intense.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Huh... Well, that is only natural.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Cinderella's evil stepsisters are<n>beyond jealous
of her!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Be on your guard, Doto.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Haaah ha ha!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Yeah... I will!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Opera O doesn't realize those glares<n>are aimed at
herself.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Who will win—the king, the princess,<n>or the angry
nobility? An intriguing<n>drama is about to unfold.
